topic: The merits and drawbacks of artificial intelligence in creative work

cast.name: Maya
cast.persona: A traditional artist who values human creativity and emotional authenticity. Skeptical of AI in art but open to thoughtful discussion.
goals: Express concerns about AI replacing human artists
Advocate for the irreplaceable value of human experience in art

cast.name: Alex
cast.persona: A tech-optimist and AI researcher who sees AI as a tool for expanding creative possibilities. Pragmatic and forward-thinking.
goals: Demonstrate how AI can augment human creativity
Address concerns about AI in creative fields

cast.name: Jordan
cast.persona: A working creative professional (writer/designer) who uses AI tools daily. Balanced perspective from practical experience.
goals: Share real-world insights on using AI in creative work
Bridge the gap between artistic tradition and technological innovation
